channel.title: Home on Ayush
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Ayush

item.title: About
item.description:
In this small corner of the web, let me share a bit of my story.

I’ve always been this curious kid, wandering about the complexity of this world, tinkering here and there. Now, I explore the world through words and code.

I’ve always wanted to study the arts and humanities, but destiny had some other plans. Here I am, on the verge of graduating with a CS degree. Honestly, I didn’t like it initially, but I’ve grown to love it. I feel like a walking paradox; I’m just as into poetry and art as I am into science and tech.

item.title: Reads
item.description:
Here are some books that I’ve read. All of them were good; some were great, and a few were remarkable.

Bookshelf

  • Phantoms in the Brain
    V.S. Ramachandran

  • The Precipice
    Toby Ord

  • A Brief History of Time
    Stephen Hawking

  • Destiny, Freedom and the Soul
    Osho

  • Four Thousand Weeks
    Oliver Burkeman

  • Mindfulness in the Modern World
    Osho

  • Man’s Search for Meaning
    Victor E. Frankl

  • The Journey of Being Human
    Osho

  • Ratan Tata
    A.K. Gandhi
